scope.instruction: PROJECT-ONLY identity cleanup prep; no provider-backed or external LLM commands.

guard_summary.selection_policy: Only high-confidence durable project identity matches were included. Candidate pairs were required to share the same durable project, compatible scope, compatible time/status as source-time variation, and no phase/option/award/contract/station/program false-friend conflict.
exclusions: Aliases already present in data/identity-overrides/merges.json under .aliases.project were excluded.
Aliases already present in visible data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch*.json project proposals through visible identity126 were excluded; no identity127 artifact was visible.
Low-confidence program-vs-project, contract option, procurement subcomponent, and broader station-package candidates were not included.
guard_summary.merge_shape_reminder: Durable merge overrides use alias_id -> target_id entries.

command_evidence.purpose: Enumerated visible identity prep artifacts and override files.
Built project alias exclusion set from existing durable overrides.
Built visible prior project alias exclusion set from prepared/applied Codex identity batches.
Inspected candidate project records, payloads, source ids, and evidence refs.
Confirmed selected aliases were absent from existing project merge overrides.
Confirmed selected aliases were absent from visible prior project identity prep artifacts.

proposed_aliases.alias_name: ADA Upgrades at 149 St-Grand Concourse and Tremont Av
proposed_aliases.reason: Same Bronx ADA accessibility design-build project at the 149 St-Grand Concourse complex and Tremont Av stations. Both records describe six new elevators, stairs, elevator machine rooms, ADA boarding areas, and the same 2/4/5 and B/D station scope; differing completion percentages and under-construction wording are source-time status snapshots, not distinct projects.

canonical.project_name: ADA upgrade 149 St-Grand Concourse and Tremont Av
canonical.description: ADA accessibility to 149 St-Grand Concourse complex (2, 4, 5) and Tremont Av (B, D) stations in the Bronx.

alias.project_name: ADA Upgrades at 149 St-Grand Concourse and Tremont Av
alias.description: Provides ADA accessibility to three underground subway stations in the Bronx: the 149 St-Grand Concourse complex (2, 4, 5) and Tremont Av (B, D).

proposed_aliases.guard_notes: Project merge guard satisfied: same stations, borough, design-build accessibility scope, and feature list. Status differences are compatible source-time snapshots. Alias was absent from existing project merges and visible prior project prep artifacts.

proposed_aliases.reason: Same Manhattan ADA design-build project at 68 St/Hunter College on the Lexington Avenue Line 6 station. Both records describe three new elevators, two street-to-platform entrances, platform or edge reconstruction, utility/SoGR work, and a $177M design-build scope; differing completion/status wording is source-time variation.

canonical.description: Design-build contract to provide ADA accessibility at 68th Street/Hunter College Station on Lexington Avenue Line (6) in Manhattan.

alias.description: Design-build contract to provide ADA accessibility at 68 St / Hunter College (6). Includes three new elevators, two new street to platform entrances, utility replacement, mezzanine expansion, track replacement work, and state of good repair work.

proposed_aliases.guard_notes: Project merge guard satisfied: exact station identity, same Manhattan borough, same accessibility scope, and no package/station false friend. Alias was absent from existing project merges and visible prior project prep artifacts.

proposed_aliases.alias_name: Borough Hall Station ADA Accessibility Upgrades
proposed_aliases.reason: Same Borough Hall Station ADA design-build project in Brooklyn. Both records describe accessibility upgrades for 4/5 service with three new elevators and platform edge reconstruction, and both are board-award source-time records.

canonical.status: Board approval sought for award November 2022
canonical.description: Design and construction of accessibility upgrades at Borough Hall Station including three new elevators, ADA boarding areas, and platform edge reconstruction for 4 and 5 trains.

alias.description: ADA improvements at Borough Hall Station including three new elevators and platform edge reconstruction for 4 and 5 trains.

proposed_aliases.guard_notes: Project merge guard satisfied: exact station, same borough, same design-build ADA scope, same 4/5 train platform-edge/elevator details. Alias was absent from existing project merges and visible prior project prep artifacts.

proposed_aliases.reason: Same Broadway Junction station accessibility project in Brooklyn. The target is the existing durable Broadway Junction accessibility merge target; both records describe ADA/accessibility improvements at the Broadway Junction station complex, and the alias adds board-approved design-build award language without changing the durable project identity.

canonical.description: Installation of accessibility improvements at the Broadway Junction subway station complex serving the A, C, J, Z, and L lines.

alias.description: ADA improvements at the Broadway Junction Station, Brooklyn.

proposed_aliases.guard_notes: Project merge guard satisfied: same station complex and accessibility/ADA scope. Target choice follows the existing override island where project_broadway-junction-accessibility already points to project_meeting-doc-129106-broadway-junction-accessibility. Alias was absent from existing project merges and visible prior project prep artifacts.

proposed_aliases.alias_name: ADA Upgrades and Circulation Improvements at Broadway Junction Complex
proposed_aliases.reason: Same Broadway Junction station accessibility project in Brooklyn. The alias describes ADA-compliant elevators, escalator replacement, Callahan-Kelly Playground work, and parking lot improvements at the Broadway Junction Station complex, matching the target's accessibility improvements and easement context for that station complex.

canonical.description: Installation of accessibility improvements at the Broadway Junction subway station complex serving the A, C, J, Z, and L lines, requiring temporary and permanent easements from NYC Parks.

alias.project_name: ADA Upgrades and Circulation Improvements at Broadway Junction Complex
alias.description: ADA upgrades including installing new ADA-compliant elevators, replacing existing escalators, providing a new comfort station at Callahan-Kelly Playground, and parking lot improvements at the Broadway Junction Station complex in Brooklyn.

proposed_aliases.guard_notes: Project merge guard satisfied: same Broadway Junction station complex, same Brooklyn location, same accessibility/elevator/circulation project scope, and Callahan-Kelly context aligns with the target. Alias was absent from existing project merges and visible prior project prep artifacts.

proposed_aliases.canonical_name: Woodhaven / Cross Bay Boulevards Select Bus Service
proposed_aliases.reason: Same Woodhaven/Cross Bay Boulevards Q52/Q53 Select Bus Service project in Queens. The alias names the Q52/53 route basis and describes the same complete-street SBS scope with bus lanes, median stations, and pedestrian safety improvements already represented by the target.

canonical.project_name: Woodhaven / Cross Bay Boulevards Select Bus Service
canonical.description: Long-term SBS project on Woodhaven and Cross Bay Boulevards addressing bus speed, pedestrian safety, and traffic flow.

alias.project_name: Woodhaven / Cross Bay Boulevard Q52/53 Select Bus Service
alias.description: Transform Woodhaven and Cross Bay Boulevards into a complete street with Select Bus Service, bus lanes, median stations, and pedestrian safety improvements.

proposed_aliases.guard_notes: Project merge guard satisfied: same corridor, routes Q52/Q53, borough, SBS type, and treatment scope. Planning/design status is compatible source-time wording. Alias was absent from existing project merges and visible prior project prep artifacts.

proposed_aliases.canonical_name: Woodhaven / Cross Bay Boulevards Select Bus Service
proposed_aliases.alias_name: Woodhaven / Cross Bay Boulevards Q52/53 Select Bus Service
proposed_aliases.reason: Same Woodhaven/Cross Bay Boulevards Q52/Q53 Select Bus Service project in Queens. The alias is a design-workshop record for the same SBS project on Woodhaven and Cross Bay Boulevards serving Q52 and Q53.

canonical.project_name: Woodhaven / Cross Bay Boulevards Select Bus Service

alias.project_name: Woodhaven / Cross Bay Boulevards Q52/53 Select Bus Service
alias.description: Select Bus Service project on Woodhaven and Cross Bay Boulevards serving the Q52 and Q53 bus routes.

proposed_aliases.guard_notes: Project merge guard satisfied: same Q52/Q53 SBS project, same Queens corridor, and compatible design-workshop source-time status. Alias was absent from existing project merges and visible prior project prep artifacts.

proposed_aliases.canonical_name: Woodhaven / Cross Bay Boulevards Select Bus Service
proposed_aliases.alias_name: Woodhaven / Cross Bay Boulevard SBS project
proposed_aliases.reason: Same Woodhaven/Cross Bay Boulevard SBS project. The alias is a 2015 CB14 draft-design presentation for the same proposed SBS corridor based on Q52/53 LTD, with dedicated bus lanes, median stations, off-board fare collection, and transit signal priority.

canonical.project_name: Woodhaven / Cross Bay Boulevards Select Bus Service
canonical.description: Long-term SBS project on Woodhaven and Cross Bay Boulevards addressing bus speed, pedestrian safety, and traffic flow.

alias.project_name: Woodhaven / Cross Bay Boulevard (Q52/53) Select Bus Service
alias.description: Proposed SBS corridor along Woodhaven and Cross Bay Boulevards based on existing Q52/53 LTD route, with dedicated bus lanes, median stations, off-board fare collection, and TSP.

proposed_aliases.guard_notes: Project merge guard satisfied: same Woodhaven/Cross Bay SBS corridor, same Q52/53 basis, same Queens borough, and same SBS treatment bundle. Draft-design status is source-time context. Alias was absent from existing project merges and visible prior project prep artifacts.
